## CSS Custom Properties

| Name           | Description                                |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `--background` | Sets the background-color of the component |
| `--radius`     | Sets the border-radius of the component    |
| `--shadow`     | Sets the box-shadow of the component       |
